productDisplayName: Baggit Women Purple Shell Baby Wallet
description: Style Note Keep your essentials together stylishly in this multi-function wallet from baggit. This light weight and slim, simply designed wallet and an imprinted brand mark reveals dual sided flap with snap button closure. It has multiple pockets inside which makes it spacious. Grab it and add a bit to your daily style.Product Details   Puple wallet with multi-coloured patch detailing on the front Dual side flap with snap button closure One main currency compartment Three card slots and two insert pockets on left and right side Branding on the back and one exterior zip pocket   Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 10 cm Width: 16 cm Depth: 1 cm
